text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #2)

Yes, the problem still exists with the current 4.4.5 version. Actually, that is why I posted the comment, as I made a new attempt upgrading from 4.3 to 4.4 and I played a bit with the options this time. Result: Installation fails with the above error if ADS is disabled. If ADS is enabled, everything is fine.
